name: python3-webob
title: python3-webob
summary: Python module providing WSGI request and response objects (Python 3)
description:
Python module providing WSGI request and response objects (Python 3)
WebOb provides wrappers around the WSGI request environment, and an object to
help create WSGI responses.
.
The objects map much of the specified behavior of HTTP, including header
parsing and accessors for other standard parts of the environment.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
